scripts.cap:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:android:run: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:electron: vite build && npx cap sync @capacitor-community/electron && npx cap open @capacitor-community/electron
scripts.cap:livereload: vite build && npx cap sync && npx cap run android --livereload --external
